articles.title: The latest AI news we announced in June 2026
articles.summary: Here are Google’s latest AI updates from June 2026.

articles.title: New York City educators and industry leaders gathered at Google’s offices to shape the future of AI in classrooms.
articles.summary: Google, the New York Jobs CEO Council and Urban Assembly hosted an AI summit for 150 education and industry leaders.

articles.title: How ChatGPT adoption has expanded
articles.summary: New OpenAI Signals data shows how ChatGPT adoption is growing globally, with users increasing usage, exploring more capabilities, and driving growth across regions and languages.

articles.title: Unlocking Britain’s next era of productivity: Building a nation of AI trailblazers
articles.summary: Google UK shares its latest Economic Impact Report and how to enable more people to unlock the benefits of AI-powered technologies.

articles.title: Inside Genebench-Pro
Introducing GeneBench-Pro
articles.summary: Introducing GeneBench-Pro, a new benchmark testing AI performance in genomics, biology, and scientific research using complex, real-world datasets.

articles.title: Core dump epidemiology: fixing an 18-year-old bug
articles.summary: OpenAI engineers used large-scale core dump analysis to debug rare infrastructure crashes, uncovering both a hardware fault and a long-standing software bug.

articles.title: Ask an AI expert: What exactly is the full stack?
articles.summary: A Google expert explains what it means to take a full-stack approach to AI and why it’s been the foundation of our AI work for so long.

articles.title: Mapping Europe’s AI Workforce Opportunity
articles.summary: A new OpenAI report maps how AI could reshape jobs across the EU, highlighting which occupations may face automation, growth, or workflow changes.

articles.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
articles.summary: HP Inc. scales its OpenAI Frontier partnership to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations.

articles.title: Previewing GPT-5.6 Sol: a next-generation model
articles.summary: OpenAI previews GPT-5.6 Sol, a next-generation model with stronger capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, paired with its most advanced safety stack.

articles.title: Our latest Google Finance upgrades, including a new app
articles.summary: The new Google Finance is coming out of beta and launching a new Android app.

articles.title: How agents are transforming work
articles.summary: A new OpenAI research paper shows how AI agents are transforming work, enabling longer, more complex tasks and expanding productivity across roles.

articles.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
articles.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom introduce Jalapeño, a custom AI chip built for LLM inference to improve performance, efficiency, and scale across AI systems.

articles.title: How GPT-5 helped immunologist Derya Unutmaz solve a 3-year-old mystery
articles.summary: GPT-5 Pro helped solve a 3-year-old immunology mystery, offering insights into T cell behavior. The breakthrough could support cancer and autoimmune research.

articles.title: Helping build shared standards for advanced AI
articles.summary: OpenAI helps build shared standards for advanced AI, supporting evaluation frameworks, safety practices, and global cooperation through the Appia Foundation.

articles.title: How Omio is building the future of conversational travel
articles.summary: Discover how Omio uses OpenAI to power conversational travel experiences, accelerate product development, and transform into an AI-native company.

articles.title: Patch the Planet: a Daybreak initiative to support open source maintainers
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces Patch the Planet, a Daybreak initiative helping open-source maintainers find, validate, and fix vulnerabilities with AI and expert review.

articles.title: Daybreak: Tools for securing every organization in the world
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces new Daybreak tools, including Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale.

articles.title: Codex-maxxing for long-running work
articles.summary: Learn how Jason Liu uses Codex to preserve context, manage complex projects, and help work continue beyond a single prompt.

articles.title: Samsung Electronics brings ChatGPT and Codex to employees
articles.summary: Samsung Electronics deploys ChatGPT Enterprise and Codex to employees worldwide, marking one of OpenAI’s largest enterprise AI rollouts.

articles.title: New usage analytics and updated spend controls for enterprises
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces new spend controls and usage analytics for ChatGPT Enterprise, helping organizations manage costs and scale AI with confidence.

articles.title: Improving health intelligence in ChatGPT
articles.summary: Learn how GPT-5.5 Instant improves ChatGPT’s health and wellness responses with stronger reasoning, better context, clearer communication, and physician-informed evaluations.

articles.title: Using AI to help physicians diagnose rare genetic diseases affecting children
articles.summary: Researchers used an OpenAI reasoning model to help diagnose rare diseases, identifying 18 new diagnoses in previously unsolved cases.

articles.title: New research shows how AMIE, our medical AI, could help manage health conditions.
articles.summary: Research in “Nature” shows our conversational AI system matches primary care physicians in complex disease management.

articles.title: A near-autonomous AI chemist improves a challenging reaction in medicinal chemistry
articles.summary: OpenAI and Molecule.one show how a near-autonomous AI chemist using GPT-5.4 improved a key drug-making reaction, advancing medicinal chemistry research.

articles.title: Introducing LifeSciBench
articles.summary: Introducing LifeSciBench, an expert-authored, expert-reviewed benchmark for evaluating how AI systems handle real-world life science research tasks and decisions.

articles.title: Predicting model behavior before release by simulating deployment
articles.summary: OpenAI introduces Deployment Simulation, a method to predict AI model behavior before deployment using real conversation data to improve safety and evaluation accuracy.

articles.summary: OpenAI launches the Partner Network, investing $150M to help global partners accelerate enterprise AI adoption, deployment, and transformation.

articles.title: New OpenAI Academy courses for the next era of work

articles.title: How Preply combines AI and human tutors to personalize learning

articles.title: How an astrophysicist uses Codex to help simulate black holes
articles.summary: Discover how astrophysicist Chi-kwan Chan uses Codex to build black hole simulations, helping scientists study extreme physics and test Einstein’s theory of general relativity.

articles.title: Supporting Europe’s work in ensuring a trustworthy AI ecosystem
articles.summary: OpenAI supports the EU Code of Practice on AI content transparency, advancing provenance standards and tools to help people understand AI-generated content.

articles.summary: Access OpenAI models and Codex through Oracle Cloud, using existing commitments to build and deploy AI with enterprise security and governance.

articles.title: PRC-linked influence operations are targeting AI debates in the US

articles.summary: See how LSEG uses OpenAI to scale trusted AI across its global business, accelerating insights, shrinking release cycles, and empowering 4,000 employees.

articles.summary: arXiv:2607.00053v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Large language models (LLMs) embedded in multi-turn agentic harnesses are reshaping software engineering (SWE), but routing every task to a frontier model is wasteful when many issues admit cheap fixes. Existing LLM routers operat

articles.title: Active Sensing for RIS-Aided Tracking and Power Control: A Hybrid Neuroevolution and Supervised Learning Approach
articles.summary: arXiv:2607.00056v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: This paper studies energy efficient tracking of power-limited mobile users with the assistance of a Reconfigurable Intelligent Surface (RIS). Since localization pilot transmissions dominate the energy budget of power-constrained d

articles.title: Enhancing Oracle Bone Inscription Recognition via Multi-Scale Layer Attention
articles.summary: arXiv:2607.00057v1 Announce Type: cross Abstract: Oracle Bone Inscriptions (OBIs) recognition plays a crucial role in understanding ancient Chinese culture. However, accurately recognizing OBIs remains highly challenging due to their complex, irregular, and often degraded shapes.
